eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Missouri; at 07:25 AM ON MAR 30, 2026 Effective until 07:40 AM MAR 31, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
THE ST LOUIS COUNTY HAS ISSUED AN AMBER ALERT FOR A CHILD ABDUCTION THAT OCCURRED AT 8915 NEW HAMPSHIRE AVE ,  AFTON, MISSOURI ON 03/30/2026 AT 07:30 AM.  

ABDUCTED WAS ALESIE DAWSON, BLACK, FEMALE, AGE 5. 

VICTIM ALESIE DAWSON IS 2 FEET 6 INCHES TALL, 60 POUNDS, HAS BLACK HAIR AND BROWN EYES. 
LAST SEEN WEARING PINK AND BLUE BARRETTES, PINK SHIRT "FLOWER POWER", BLUE SHORTS. 

THE CHILD WAS LEFT UNATTENDED IN A RUNNING VEHICLE. THE VEHICLE WAS STOLEN AND RECOVERED A SHORT TIME LATER. THE CHILD IS STILL MISSING. 

PLEASE CALL 9 1 1 IF YOU HAVE ANY INFORMATION PERTAINING TO THIS ALERT.
